title: CD4+ T Cell Isolation and Stimulation
author: Dorota Kmiec
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.r7ad9ie
materials: RosetteSep™ Human CD4+ T Cell Enrichment Cocktail (Stemcell)
Bring all reagents and the centrifuge (Eppendorf 5810R) to a room temperature.

Optional: determine isolated cell purity by staining for CD4 and CD11c surface receptors and flow cytometric analysis. Suggested antibodies: anti-CD4-PerCP (cat# 550631, BD Biosciences) and anti-CD11c-FITC (cat#ab22540, abcam). CD4+ T cells are CD4+ and CD11c - .

steps.title: Dilute buffy coat (Deutsches Rotes Kreuz,...
steps.instruction: Dilute buffy coat (Deutsches Rotes Kreuz, DRK) 1:4 with DPBS (Gibco).

steps.title: Add 50µl of RosetteSep™ Human CD4+...
steps.instruction: Add 50µl of RosetteSep™ Human CD4+ T Cell Enrichment Cocktail (Stemcell) per 1ml of the diluted buffy coat.

steps.title: Add 20ml of Biocoll separating solution...
steps.instruction: Add 20ml of Biocoll separating solution (Biochrom, cat# L6115) into 50 ml plastic tube.

steps.title: Slowly pipette 20ml of diluted buffy...
steps.instruction: Slowly pipette 20ml of diluted buffy coat over Biocoll solution without mixing the layers.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1200 RCF for 20...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1200 RCF for 20 min with the brake switched off.

steps.title: Transfer the white interface containing CD4+...
steps.instruction: Transfer the white interface containing CD4+ T cells to a new 50ml tube.

steps.title: Add DPBS up to the total...
steps.instruction: Add DPBS up to the total volume of 40ml and centrifuge at 1400rpm for 5min.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and resuspend the...
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 40ml of DPBS.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and resuspend cell...
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and resuspend cell pellet in 10ml of RPMI1640 supplemented with 2 mM L-glutamine, 100 µg/ml streptomycin, 100 units/ml penicillin, 10 % (v/v) heat inactivated FCS (Gibco).

steps.title: If cells are to be infected...
steps.instruction: If cells are to be infected with SIV or HIV follow steps 16-17.

steps.title: Adjust cell concentration to 2
steps.instruction: Adjust cell concentration to 2.000.000 cells/ml by adding more medium.

steps.title: Add 1 µg/ml PHA (Murex) and...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µg/ml PHA (Murex) and 10 ng/ml IL-2 (Sigma-Ark) for stimulation.

steps.title: Incubate for 3 days at 37°C, 5%CO2
steps.instruction: Incubate for 3 days at 37°C, 5%CO2. Stimulated cells should form large clumps.
